title: Queue and Worker
description: Queue and Worker documents overview material for Queue and Worker in the language domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights RequestQueue + Worker + ResponseQueue, Workflow orchestrator + ResponseQueue, Stream Processing, and ? + Worker, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include async, long-running, queue-worker, language, and concepts, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / concepts / queue-worker / index, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
